name: Silver The Hedgehog
description:
Silver finds you in Crisis City among the rubble, and is determined to help you!

Heyy! This Silver bot was requested by @PuyoPuyoGirl !! Also I just really wanted to make Silver, haha.

I kind of did my own thing with the scenario, hope you don't mind!

This bot takes place in Crisis City/New City during Silver's messed up future, based off of 06! He has a pretty open-ended greeting, so you can do whatever you want from there and your relationship to him is up to you.

Definitely plan on using this as a base to make more Silver bots hehe! If he has any issues, let me know and I'll try to fix it.
creator: Star_Fantasy
